name: cpp-13
title: cpp-13
summary:
GNU C preprocessor
A macro processor that is used automatically by the GNU C compiler
to transform programs before actual compilation.
.
This package has been separated from gcc for the benefit of those who
require the preprocessor but not the compiler.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use cpp-13 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cpp-13 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for cpp-13.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair cpp-13 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `cpp-13 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
